description.value:
A mask or helmet with an internal air supply for toxic atmospheres and limited underwater use.

Effect: Immune to gases and can survive underwater at limited depths. Air canisters last one hour and take a Full Action to replace. Good models last two hours; Poor models take two Full Actions to replace. Replacement canisters are Scarce.

Notes: -
